tasks.label: Bootstrap: Dev Workspace
args: python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip && if [ -f client/python/pyproject.toml ]; then python3 -m pip install -e client/python || true; fi && if [ -f docs/requirements.txt ]; then python3 -m pip install -r docs/requirements.txt || true; fi && if [ -f test/requirements.txt ]; then python3 -m pip install -r test/requirements.txt || true; fi
